headline: How MetLife’s Cheap Valuation, Dividend Update, and AI Insights Will Impact MetLife (MET) Investors
summary: MetLife recently featured on a list of very cheap stocks favored by billionaires, while confirming its first-quarter 2026 dividend on its Series A floating-rate preferred shares and highlighting solid earnings growth in Group Benefits and Retirement and Income Solutions earlier this year. At the same time, MetLife’s latest U.S. Employee Benefit Trends Study reveals employees are both hopeful about AI’s efficiency potential and worried about job security, underscoring how the company’s...

headline: Is MetLife (MET) One of the Best Insurance Stocks to Buy
summary: MetLife Inc. (NYSE:MET) is one of the 11 best insurance stocks to buy right now. On March 10, MetLife Inc. (NYSE:MET) stated that it had been informed of Potemkin’s unsolicited mini-tender offer to buy up to 10,000 shares of MetLife’s common stock from its existing shareholders. This represents approximately 0.002% of the total outstanding shares […]
